parsed_review.summary: CP00-606 read-only review complete: descriptor-only Risk-A pack (10 units, RP19.P08.M06.S08-S17) is internally consistent across registry, requirements, service builders, validators, contract, validator script, README, and tests; no-write/no-real-data and Claude-read-only boundaries hold; review hardening preflight is valid. PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with one by-design P3 (post-review artifacts not yet generated). No P0/P1; closeout not blocked.

findings.title: Post-review adjudication/inspection/result artifacts not yet present (expected sequencing)
findings.details: The manifest lists required_pack_artifacts and evidence_refs that include docs/closeout-packs/cp00-606/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json exist at review time (confirmed via Glob). This is consistent with status=implemented_pending_review, production_ready=false, pack_level_claude_review.status=pending with empty valid_review_receipts, and the documented hardening_sequence which places finding_adjudication and construction_inspection AFTER this read_only_claude_run step. command-evidence.json notes explicitly document these as post-review-gated, produced before commit. Their absence is by-design sequencing, not missing evidence, so it does not block this review.
findings.recommendation: Generate claude-review-result.json from THIS accepted review, then run finding_adjudication and construction_inspection, and confirm all three artifacts plus the review receipt are present and pass npm run closeout-pack:validate before the CP00-606 commit, per the manifest hardening_sequence and command-evidence post-review-gated command list.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected sequencing under the review-hardening flow; no action required during the read-only review. Artifacts must be produced and validated before commit.
